title: Thani Oruvan Ninaithu Vittaal Lyrics Thani Oruvan

Thani Oruvan Ninaithu Vittaal Lyrics Thani Oruvan Songs Lyrics
#HipHopTamizha

look at me.
you can call me the mass disaster.
i am the monster.
never ever read my chapter.
i am a gangster
god is my freaking banker
money is the master
but that’s not why i am running after.
pistol pol kangal kondirukum
naan oruvan, indha ulagathil
yaar endhan pagaivan.
naan oru thani padai
naane endhan thalaivan.

thani oruvan ninaithuvittaal
indha ulagathil thadaigal illai.
thani oruvan ninaithuvittaal
indha ulagame thadaiyumillai

thavar izhaithalum
adhai thadupen naan
sudum theemaigalai
dhinam azhipen naan

sattai eduthu nattai thiruthu
ilam thalaimurai
thannai nee vazhi nadathu
theemaikedhiraai naanum varuven
thani oruvanai un mun padai eduthu

oru naal illai oru naal
indha ulagam azhiyum thozha
adhu naal varum munne
unnai vendru mudipen vaa da

thani oruvan ninaithuvittaal
indha ulagathil thadaigal illai.
thani oruvan ninaithuvittaal
indha ulagame thadaiyumillai

thavar izhaithalum
adhai thadupen naan
sudum theemaigalai
dhinam azhipaen naan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys themes of strength and individuality, portraying the protagonist as a powerful figure in a challenging world.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

In Thani Oruvan, this song underscores the protagonist's journey and determination to overcome obstacles.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features vocals by Bobo Shashi and Hip Hop Tamizha, with music composed by Hip Hop Tamizha.

When was the song released?

The song was released on July 23, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thani Oruvan Ninaithu Vittaal, the protagonist expresses his fierce individuality and determination against societal challenges. The energetic beats and powerful lyrics create a motivational atmosphere, making it a perfect anthem for those seeking inspiration. This song encapsulates the essence of the film Thani Oruvan, where the struggle for justice and self-identity is paramount. It evokes feelings of empowerment and resilience, resonating deeply with the audience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thani Oruvan Ninaithu Vittaal is a high-octane anthem that perfectly captures the essence of determination and grit. The unique collaboration between Bobo Shashi and Hip Hop Tamizha delivers a powerful vibe that resonates with the youth. Dive into the world of Thani Oruvan and experience the electrifying beats that will get you moving!
stanzaMeanings: Look at me. You can call me a mass disaster. I am the monster. Never read my story. I am a gangster; God is my banker. Money is the master, but that's not why I'm chasing after it. I have a gun in my eyes; I am a man, who is my enemy in this world? I am a unique soldier; I am my own leader.
I am always a unique person.
If a unique person thinks, there are no limits in this world. If a unique person thinks, this world has no boundaries.
Even if I make mistakes, I will overcome them. I will destroy the bad things every day.
Taking a stand, changing the country, guiding the youth, I will also come to you as a unique person, taking your army.
There is no day; there is no day when this world will be destroyed. That day will come before I decide to need you, come on.
If a unique person thinks, there are no limits in this world. If a unique person thinks, this world has no boundaries.
Even if I make mistakes, I will overcome them. I will destroy the bad things every day.
Fear not, destroy the evil of man, and defeat the enemy.
Fear not, destroy the evil of man, and defeat the enemy.
Leave it, leave it... defeat the enemy.
